prompt: Write segment 3 (THE SOCIAL PROOF, Day 3) of the openpatent.ai 10-segment cold-outreach sequence, tuned for the **ip_boutique** persona — a 5–40-attorney IP firm with 50–500 active matters, where the Managing Partner decides and paralegals do the daily work. The email must (a) be ≤150 words in the body (excluding signature footer), (b) name the 6-layer disclosure model (title, description, drawings, prototype reference, contributor hash, chain receipt), (c) mention Bitcoin OP_RETURN anchoring as the public witness, (d) name the Sovereign tier ($999/mo) as the docketing-replacement, and reference the Atelier tier ($99/mo) and the Founder's Mark tier ($9,999/yr) as bookends, (e) include two specific case-study-style proof points (e.g., a boutique that moved 142 active matters in 30 days; a matter where chain-anchor evidence ended a discovery fight in one filing). Litigator-precise tone. Cite federal rules. Avoid 'Web3', 'crypto', 'blockchain solution'. The email must end with this exact signature: 'The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets.' Return ONLY the email as plain text. Do not include the unsubscribe footer (it is added automatically).
